name: avaya-troubleshooting
description: Senior Avaya UC & CC troubleshooting expert. Diagnoses faults across AES, JTAPI, TSAPI, CSTA, DMCC, AACC, Oceana, POM, Recording, Analytics, SIP, certificates, email/social channels, IP Office, and more. Includes structured SR workflows, trace analysis, and cross-layer correlation.
